full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Explaining the performance gap between our LCGMM result and the paper's results.
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: LCGMM gets 93.8% on Wine but the paper reports 73.6% on MNIST. How can I explain this difference honestly?
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Noted that the datasets differ fundamentally — MNIST has 10 classes and 784 features vs Wine's 3 classes and 13 features.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Verified that datasets are different and there is no equivalent number in the paper for Wine.
